execution_summary: Environment was built using rocker/verse:4.3.1 with tidyverse, broom. Original RMarkdown failed in batch; created participant_test_summary.R to run focal analysis and wrapped in a bash script. Container executed script, generated participant level summary and t-test. No major deviations from preregistration; only code modularisation.

code_executed.logs: Image built from rocker/verse, installed tidyverse, broom.
t = 4.9201, df = 472, p = 1.197e-06, 95% CI [0.0441, 0.1026]; means contingent 0.771, full-information 0.697.

results.hypothesis_tested: Participants assigned to the contingent-feedback condition will exhibit a higher average 1D accuracy score at the test phase than participants assigned to the full-information condition.

tables.table_description: Independent-samples t-test results saved to t_test_results.csv
